# UiHost.IsUiInitializeResult method

Returns `true` when *value* is a well-formed `UiInitializeResult` — in particular it carries a string `protocolVersion`. The absence of that field is a conformance failure (spec §26.5.1, R-26.5.1-b).

```csharp
public static bool IsUiInitializeResult(JsonNode? value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The candidate initialize result (raw). |

## Return Value

`true` when conformant.
